scope.summary: Pre-credential hardening: set a baseline Content-Security-Policy on the Tauri webview, fix the placeholder window title, and resolve the svelte-check @types/node gap before any credential handling lands.
goals: tauri.conf.json sets a restrictive CSP (was null) that still allows Tauri IPC
Frontend type-check is clean (0 errors, 0 warnings)
Window/document title is the product name, not the scaffold placeholder
nonGoals: Any credential import, storage, or login (later features)
Runtime webview CSP enforcement verification (requires GUI; deferred to inspect-app)

acceptance.description: tauri.conf.json defines a non-null CSP and the Tauri config still builds.
svelte-check reports 0 errors and 0 warnings after adding @types/node and removing the stale ts-expect-error.
